motifs.name: forest_path
motifs.description: Path through the forest, central to nomadic life

motifs.name: nomad_mark
motifs.description: Simple mark left at camp sites

motifs.name: bark_line
motifs.description: Line pattern from bark cloth texture

motifs.name: yellow_leaf
motifs.description: Pattern of the yellow leaf that gives the Mlabri their nickname 'spirits of the yellow leaves'

motifs.name: bamboo_shelter
motifs.description: Temporary bamboo lean-to shelter reflecting the Mlabri practice of building and abandoning camps

motifs.name: wild_boar
motifs.description: Wild boar track pattern from the primary hunted animal in Mlabri tradition

motifs.name: mountain_stream
motifs.description: Flowing stream pattern from the mountain rivers where the Mlabri fish with baskets

motifs.name: honey_comb
motifs.description: Hexagonal honeycomb pattern reflecting Mlabri wild honey gathering from forest bee colonies
